defects.scenarioId: A repo already in safeword style stays in safeword style
defects.note: ADVERSARIAL-VACUOUS (held-out, a type the baseline MISSES on train): the Given ('already formatted in safeword's Prettier style') makes the Then ('formatted in safeword's Prettier style') true regardless of the edit. Placed in held-out so Phase 5 can measure whether a GEPA winner's recall gain on trivially-true generalizes. Other two scenarios unchanged & clean.
